stories.title: Vitest Workspace + srs-engine Package Scaffold
stories.summary: Created root Vitest workspace config and full `packages/srs-engine/` skeleton. `pnpm install`, `pnpm build`, and `pnpm test` all exit 0. Three gaps in DS01 spec were corrected during implementation (see recent-decisions.md).

stories.title: pnpm Workspace + Turborepo
stories.summary: Created the three root config files that establish pnpm workspace and Turborepo build orchestration. All acceptance criteria pass. One gap found in DS01: Turbo 2.x requires `packageManager` in `package.json` ‚Äî added and documented in `recent-decisions.md`.

stories.title: Root tsconfig + ESLint flat config
stories.summary: Created shared TypeScript base config and ESLint flat config. Config parses and resolves correctly against `packages/**/*.ts`. One gap found in DS01: ESLint 9.x requires `jiti` to load `.ts` config files ‚Äî installed as root devDependency.

stories.title: EP02-ST01 Changelog: Engine types
stories.summary: ### Created - `packages/srs-engine/src/types.ts` ‚Äî all engine-owned types: `MasteryPhase`, `WordCategory`, `FsrsCardState`, `WordState`, `QuizAnswer`, `SrsConfig` ### Modified - `packages/srs-engine/src/index.ts` ‚Äî replaced empty stub with named re-exports of all 6 types - `CODEMAP.md` ‚Äî added `src/types.ts` entry; updated `src/index.ts` description

stories.title: EP02-ST02 Changelog: Mastery counting + phase transition
stories.summary: ### Created - `packages/srs-engine/src/mastery.ts` ‚Äî `updateMastery(state, isCorrect, config)` pure function: mastery counting (+1 correct / -1 wrong, floor 0), configurable thresholds (curated 10, foundational 5), Learning ‚Üí ANKI transition, 3-lapse ANKI ‚Üí Learning reset - `packages/srs-engine/__tests__/unit/mastery.test.ts` ‚Äî 13 unit tests covering all paths (strict TDD) ### Modified - `packages/srs-engine/src/index.ts` ‚Äî added `updateMastery` export - `CODEMAP.md` ‚Äî added `src/mastery.ts` entry

stories.title: SpacedRepetitionScheduler interface + ReviewResult type
stories.summary: Defined the scheduling domain interface and result type. Pure type definitions ‚Äî no runtime logic. Establishes the contract that `FsrsScheduler` (EP02-ST04) must implement.

stories.title: FsrsScheduler adapter
stories.summary: Implemented `FsrsScheduler` ‚Äî a concrete `SpacedRepetitionScheduler` wrapping `ts-fsrs`. Handles ANKI review scheduling with `Rating.Good`/`Rating.Again` mapping, 90-day interval cap, and clean `FsrsCardState` ‚Üî ts-fsrs `Card` translation (no ts-fsrs types in public surface). Added `ts-fsrs@^5` as a runtime dependency.

stories.title: SRS core demo script
stories.summary: Created `scripts/demo-srs.ts` ‚Äî a runnable checkpoint that exercises `updateMastery` + `FsrsScheduler` directly on one word. Prints mastery count incrementing, phase flipping to `srsM2_review`, and the first ANKI interval to stdout. Added `tsx` and `@gll/srs-engine` as root devDeps, `"demo"` script, and `"type": "module"` to root `package.json` (required for tsx to resolve ESM-only package exports). EP02 is now Impl-Complete.

stories.title: Two-Axis Knowledge Architecture
stories.summary: Implemented two-axis knowledge compaction (time archive + domain KNOWLEDGE.md); specified AGN rollup lifecycle (plan‚Üíartifact+archive entry); tools (domains-from-diff, archive-append, archive-check) and archive-epic skill.

EP02.title: SRS Engine Core: Mastery + ANKI Scheduling
